# WHMCS Emoji Compatibility Guide

> A searchable, conservative emoji shortlist for testing in WHMCS product names, emails, and knowledge base articles.

## Tool

- [WHMCS Emoji Compatibility Guide](https://jaydenyoonzk.github.io/whmcs-emoji-compatibility-guide/): the tool itself, a static page that runs entirely in the browser with no accounts and no data collection

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/whmcs-emoji-compatibility-guide#readme): what the tool does, how it works, and its engineering notes
- [Changelog](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/whmcs-emoji-compatibility-guide/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): dated release history

## Source

- [Repository](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/whmcs-emoji-compatibility-guide): MIT licensed source code
